name: Foundry Auditing Env
install: bash -lc 'set -euxo pipefail; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then apt-get update && apt-get install -y ca-certificates curl build-essential pkg-config libssl-dev llvm clang cmake jq git; fi; if [ ! -d "$HOME/.foundry" ]; then curl -L https://foundry.paradigm.xyz | bash; fi; $HOME/.foundry/bin/foundryup'
